Code.Other: Create a dedicated service account, assign only required admin roles, rotate the API token, and revoke Super Admin-owned tokens.

Recommendation.Text: Create API tokens with dedicated service accounts assigned least-privilege admin roles instead of Super Admin.

CheckTitle: Okta API tokens are not owned by Super Admin users
Description: Okta API tokens inherit the admin permissions of the user that created them, so token owners should not hold the Super Admin role.
Risk: A compromised API token owned by a Super Admin grants broad organization administration capability.
